coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 43-group watertight Bolt closure.
validation: The authored 13-pass heal branch is manifold in both Blender and GN-VM. Blender's native OpenVDB result varied from 16,526-16,598 vertices across ten sequential runs; the stored 16,570 / 16,572 reference is one valid schedule result. The browser produces 16,220 / 16,222 (2.11% below that reference) with 100% node coverage. Raycast now follows Blender's float32 direction normalization and watertight triangle test. Re-importing the current pass-one browser mesh into Blender and sampling the same 43 x 43 x 71 SDF lattice matches Blender's inside/outside classification at 131,270 of 131,279 samples (99.993%); the nine remaining differences are coincident-surface BVH tie selections. The full 13-pass validation takes about 181 seconds on the validation machine.
